ab: muri makanema sun a sema tapav?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: muri maka palidring aken a sema tapav.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: muri makanema timadju nu sema biuing?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: muri makanema timadju nu sema kakipucemelan?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: djemavac timadju a sema biuing.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: djemavac timadju a sema kakipucemelan.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: makanema sun nu sema bukutu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: makavavav aken tua sikuki a sema bukutu.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: makanema sun nu sema bukutu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: makavavav aken tua varukur a sema bukutu.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: anema su pakavavavan nu sema umaq sun?
en: How do you go home?

ab: makavavav aken tua sipatjatjeketjek a ljiuk a sema umaq.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: anema pakavavavan ni Muni a sema kakituluan?
en: How does Muni go to school?

ab: anema pakavavavan ni Muni a sema gakku?
en: How does Muni go to school?

ab: na makavavav tua ljiuk ti Muni a sema kakituluan.
en: Muni goes to school by train.

ab: na makavavav tua ljiuk ti Muni a sema gakku.
en: Muni goes to school by train.

ab: anema pakavavavan ni Camak nu sema lizuk?
en: How does Camak go to downtown?

ab: na makatulay ti Camak nu sema lizuk.
en: Camak goes to downtown by bicycle.

ab: makavavav sun tua sipatjatjeketjek a ljiuk a sema gakku?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: makavavav sun tua sipatjatjeketjek a ljiuk a sema kakituluan?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: ini, makavavav aken tua basu nu sema gakku.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: ini, makavavav aken tua basu nu sema kakituluan.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: makatulay sun nu sema kakituluan?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: makatulay sun nu sema gakku?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: ui, makatulay aken nu sema kakituluan.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: ui, makatulay aken nu sema gakku.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: tjevavav sun tua tjasaljiuk nu sema Tjuaqau?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: tjevavav sun tua tjasaljiuk nu sema Takau?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: ui, makavavav aken tua tjasaljiuk nu sema Tjuaqau aken.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: ui, makavavav aken tua tjasaljiuk nu sema Takau aken.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: nu sema Valangau sun ljiuk a su pakavavavan manu sikuki?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: makavavav aken ta sikuki, tjadjaljav a sikuki tua ljiuk.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: nu sema lizuk sun makavavav sun tua basu manu maka palidring sun?
ch: A:你去市區搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the downtown or take the bus?

ab: makapalidring aken a sema lizuk, tjamadjulu a makapalidring tua makabasu.
ch: B:我開車去市區，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the downtown because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: aza sinantjaljacadjuran a siubay na sedut tua nu umaq?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: inika dut, semavid aken a maka utubay nu sema ta sinantjaljacadjuran a siubay aken.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: aza pusasusuqanan na sedut tua kakituluan?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: aza pusasusuqanan na sedut tua gakku?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: dut aravac, nu djemavac tja djaljunen.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: aza kakanan na sedut tua ljaljevavavan tua palidring?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: nu sasav ta ljaljevavavan ta palidring sa djavac nu lima a qutjequtjan tja djaljunen.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
